case_title: ERIK RAPOPORT VS. CHRISTINE HARMESON et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAPOPORT, ERIK
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR BENJAMIN CLYDE HUTCHINSON.
ARBITRATOR WILLIAM HANSON NORMAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-05-2007 THROUGH JAN-03-2008.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-04-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
